title: Lockout banner does not appear after the 5th failed login attempt
summary_markdown:
The lockout flow in `src/middleware/rate-limit.ts` correctly counts to 5 but the response payload omits the `locked: true` flag the front-end checks. As a result the inline error stays on the generic "Email or password is incorrect" string instead of switching to "Account temporarily locked", and the `Reset password` link never appears.

User impact: locked-out users have no path to recovery without reading docs; support load spikes after rotation events.

The other two failures in the suite (`session persists across a hard reload`, `wrong password clears password field`) are passing — only the lockout flow regressed.
reproduction_steps: Reset the rate limiter and seed a user (`casey@example.com` / `correct horse battery`).
Submit the form with the wrong password five times in under 15 minutes.
Observe the inline error after the 5th submission.
expected: After the 5th failed attempt the inline error reads 'Account temporarily locked' and a 'Reset password' link is rendered.
actual: The generic 'Email or password is incorrect' error is shown; the 'Reset password' link is absent.
